title: Felt Furniture Sliders for Wooden Floors, Beige 8PCS -9cm (3 ½”) Thick Furniture Pad Gliders for Heavy Duty Items, Moving Heavy Furniture Quickly and Easily
features: 【Thickened Felt & EVA Padding】 These furniture sliders feature enhanced thick felt pads combined with EVA, It allows heavy furniture to glide more smoothly across the floor, reducing the physical effort required to move it.

【Reusable and Easy to Move Furniture】 These felt furniture sliders are designed to help you easily move heavy furniture, allowing you to effortlessly rearrange your space or clean under large furniture, preventing floor damage and enabling easy movement.

【2 Sizes Available】 Our Round Sliders are available in 2 sizes. The small furniture slider has a diameter of 9 cm, and the large furniture slider has a diameter of 12 cm. perfect for furniture like sofas, beds, wardrobes, bookshelf, fridge, piano and all Other large appliances and furniture. The generous size and quantity ensure comprehensive coverage and protection.

【Versatile Use for All Hard Floors】Suitable for all types of hard flooring, including hardwood, laminate, tile, and vinyl. These sliders prevent scratches, dents, and scuffs, keeping your floors pristine.

【Easy to Install & Use】Simply place the sliders under the furniture legs and enjoy hassle-free movement. No tools or adhesives are needed, making them ideal for quick and easy floor protection solutions.
